visual_description: The audio is dominated by a powerful and dramatic orchestral score. It begins with a high-pitched, sustained, and slightly dissonant string note that creates a sense of suspense and anticipation. A man in a dark suit is shown in a dimly lit nighttime scene. He is seen from the side as he walks alongside a light-colored car. The camera is positioned low, focusing on the man and the vehicle. The car's interior is faintly visible through the windows. The background is dark and out of focus, with the soft, blurred lights of a city at night creating a moody atmosphere. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper right corner of the frame. The camera pans slowly to the right, following the man as he moves along the side of the car. The shot is tight, emphasizing the man's movement and the sleek, reflective surface of the car. The lighting remains low and atmospheric, casting deep shadows. The camera continues its smooth pan, revealing the rear of the car. The man, still in silhouette, walks past the back of the vehicle. The focus shifts slightly to the car's rear wheel and taillight, which are just visible in the darkness. The "风行网" watermark remains
